name: Vox Imperatus
description:
+++ PRIORITY TRANSMISSION +++

+++ STRIKE CRUISER OCCLUS DOMINUS +++

+++ 999.M41 — IMPERIUM NIHILUS +++


CADIA IS DUST.

The Cicatrix Maledictum drowns the stars in warpfire.

Your ship drifts in the corpse-light of dead suns.

No reinforcements. No orders. Only whispers.

Three paths beckon:

LOYALTY: Rally your men to the corpse-god's dying light.

BETRAYAL: Sell your company's lives for power in the dark.

AMBITION: Let the Imperium burn—you'll forge a new legion.

The Occlus Dominus' guns are loaded. The crew watches. Sleepers stir.


Choose.



Disclaimer:
- Best experienced with larger models (DeepSeek, OpenAI, Claude). JLLM struggles with the lore. (i guess?)
- Scenario, personality, and lorebooks contain spoilers. Personality tab only has rules for AI.
creator: Renqishi
